title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: Recommended path: persist the credential through Claude CLI’s own local auth store (`claude auth login` as default, `claude setup-token` only if you need long-lived non-interactive auth), not via repo env/bootstrap files. Why: local-direct is documented as “CLI pre-login first” and treats `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as optional ([README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md):151, [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh):74), while secret-plane policy forbids live secrets in repo `.env*` and limits env files to one-shot bootstrap ([kernel-fugue-secret-plane.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-fugue-secret-plane.md):7, [kernel-fugue-secret-plane.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/kernel-fugue-secret-plane.md):84). `bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh` is for syncing process/env-file values into GitHub secret planes (CI), not for local Claude runtime credential persistence ([bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh):25).
